title: OldCounter
description: A Modern and Simple Minecraft Server Manage Plugin.
body:
![Counter Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/487c7050df801c8248cdf79aeb9a3a70f5f51433.png) # OldCounter Welcome to OldCounter, the legacy release of a lightweight yet powerful Minecraft Bukkit server-management plugin! > Warning: This is the OLD version. It is end of life(EOL). We won't fix any issue, add any feature or give any support since now. A complete rewrite (NewCounter) is under active development. You can contact us if you need; ## Descriptions Does your Minecraft Server need a management plugin? Counter can help you! What is Counter? It is: - Essential server-management tools - A clean, modern chat interface - The combined features of many popular plugins Actually,we planned to make Counter a compound plugin in the future. ## Supports **This version of Counter has some problems:** - This build is frozen; all future work is going into the upcoming rewrite. - Simplified Chinese only (multi-language coming in the rewrite).
Known Issues - Gradient colors and boss-bars may render incorrectly. - Blank lines in UIs can appear in the wrong places. - Ban-duration calculations are inaccurate. - The plugin cannot reload itself. - Several commands don’t work from the console.
If you want to feedback, please contact we by using:
**E-Mail:** counter@kyoikumi.xyz
**Tencent QQ:** 2877165147
